caption: A woman with silver-blonde hair tied in a bun is seated at a table against a plain light-colored wall. She wears a dark navy blazer over a red top. A clear plastic water bottle sits on the table in front of her, and a thin microphone is positioned near her face. In the upper left corner of the scene, the logo "mediasite by sonicbloom" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman is initially seen leaning her head on her left hand, looking off-camera to the left with a thoughtful expression. As the sequence progresses, she remains in this pensive posture for a short time before gradually lowering her hand from her face. By the final scene, she has shifted her gaze slightly more forward and has her arms crossed in front of her, though she continues to look toward the side.
